name: IRIS USA Open Top Cat Litter Box w/Scatter Shield
description: The IRIS USA Open Top Cat Litter Box with Scatter Shield & Scoop features extra-tall walls to help contain litter and spray while keeping dirt out. The open top provides quick and easy access, while the deep design gives your cat a semi-private space to take care of business. Recessed bottoms and molded-in feet help keep the cat litter box in place, and the molded-in rims around the pan add extra strength and stability. Plus, the high-polished interior surfaces and included litter scoop make this litter box easy to clean!
